original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Elizabeth, Abigail, Chloe, and Riley. As Elizabeth put it, "Abigail is a knave if and only if Riley is a knave". "Elizabeth is a knight or Elizabeth is a knave" - Abigail. "If Elizabeth is a knave then Abigail is a knight," Chloe declared. Riley noted, "Abigail is a knave if and only if Chloe is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
